days.summary: OpenAI expanded its platform stack with new realtime voice models in the API that can reason, translate, and transcribe speech, while also rolling out ChatGPT Trusted Contact for self-harm intervention workflows. ByteDance Seed separately previewed Dola-Seed-2.0 and introduced Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM, signaling continued competition in low-latency multimodal and voice-native model interfaces. On the research side, UniPool proposed a globally shared expert pool for Mixture-of-Experts architectures, a potentially important path to reducing MoE parameter growth as models scale in depth.
